00000000 add 00010001 = 00010001/0
11111111 add 00000001 = 00000000/1
10000000 add 00000001 = 10000001/0
10101011 add 01010101 = 00000000/1
00000000 sub 00000001 = 11111111/0
10000001 sub 10000000 = 00000001/0
01111111 sub 00000001 = 01111110/0
00000000 sub 11111111 = 00000001/0
00000000  or 00000000 = 00000000/1
00000000 and 11111111 = 00000000/1
10000001 and 10000000 = 10000000/0
10101010  or 01010101 = 11111111/0
0000000000000000 add 0001000100010001 = 0001000100010001/0
1111111111111111 add 0000000000000001 = 0000000000000000/1
1000000010000000 add 0000000100000001 = 1000000110000001/0
1010101010101011 add 0101010101010101 = 0000000000000000/1
0000000000000000 sub 0000000000000001 = 1111111111111111/0
1000000110000001 sub 1000000010000000 = 0000000100000001/0
0111111111111111 sub 0000000000000001 = 0111111111111110/0
0000000000000000 sub 1111111111111111 = 0000000000000001/0
0000000000000000  or 0000000000000000 = 0000000000000000/1
0000000000000000 and 1111111111111111 = 0000000000000000/1
1000000110000001 and 1000000000000000 = 1000000000000000/0
1010101010101010  or 0101010101010101 = 1111111111111111/0
